mapper.select:
select * from upstream_system_sync_request
order by submitted_time desc, request_id desc

select * from upstream_system_sync_task
order by task_id desc
select * from upstream_system_sync_task where status = 'PENDING' and (next_attempt_time is null or next_attempt_time <= sysdate()) order by priority asc, task_id asc limit #{limit}
select * from upstream_system_sync_task where status in ('CLAIMED', 'RUNNING') and lease_until is not null and lease_until < #{now} order by lease_until asc, task_id asc
mapper.update: update upstream_system_sync_task set status = 'CLAIMED', lease_owner = #{leaseOwner}, lease_until = #{leaseUntil}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId} and status = 'PENDING'

update upstream_system_sync_task set status = 'RUNNING', started_time = #{startedTime}, trace_id = #{traceId}, lease_until = #{leaseUntil}, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId} and status = 'CLAIMED'

update upstream_system_sync_task set status = #{status}, finished_time = #{finishedTime}, lease_owner = '', lease_until = null, current_request_log_id = #{currentRequestLogId}, pulled_count = coalesce(#{pulledCount}, 0), inserted_count = coalesce(#{insertedCount}, 0), changed_count = coalesce(#{changedCount}, 0), unchanged_count = coalesce(#{unchangedCount}, 0), disabled_count = coalesce(#{disabledCount}, 0), failed_count = coalesce(#{failedCount}, 0), error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId} and status in ('CLAIMED', 'RUNNING')

update upstream_system_sync_task set status = 'CANCELED', finished_time = sysdate(), error_code = 'CANCELED', error_message = #{message}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode} and task_id = #{taskId} and status in ('PENDING', 'CLAIMED')

update upstream_system_sync_request r join ( select request_no, count(1) as task_count, sum(case when status = 'SUCCESS' then 1 else 0 end) as success_count, sum(case when status = 'FAILED' then 1 else 0 end) as failed_count, sum(case when status = 'TIMEOUT' then 1 else 0 end) as timeout_count, sum(case when status = 'SKIPPED' then 1 else 0 end) as skipped_count, sum(case when status = 'CANCELED' then 1 else 0 end) as cancelled_count, min(started_time) as started_time, case when sum(case when status in ('PENDING', 'CLAIMED', 'RUNNING') then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then max(finished_time) else null end as finished_time, substring_index(group_concat(nullif(error_message, '') order by task_id desc separator ' | '), ' | ', 1) as last_error_message from upstream_system_sync_task where request_no = #{requestNo} group by request_no ) t on t.request_no = r.request_no set r.task_count = t.task_count, r.success_count = coalesce(t.success_count, 0), r.failed_count = coalesce(t.failed_count, 0), r.timeout_count = coalesce(t.timeout_count, 0), r.skipped_count = coalesce(t.skipped_count, 0), r.cancelled_count = coalesce(t.cancelled_count, 0), r.started_time = t.started_time, r.finished_time = t.finished_time, r.last_error_message = coalesce(t.last_error_message, ''), r.status = case when t.finished_time is null then case when t.started_time is null then 'PENDING' else 'RUNNING' end when coalesce(t.failed_count, 0) > 0 then 'FAILED' when coalesce(t.timeout_count, 0) > 0 then 'TIMEOUT' when coalesce(t.cancelled_count, 0) = t.task_count then 'CANCELED' when coalesce(t.success_count, 0) = t.task_count then 'SUCCESS' else 'SKIPPED' end, r.update_time = sysdate() where r.request_no = #{requestNo}
